texto: Jellinek's disease (alcoholism) is responsible for: 50 percent of all auto fatalities 80 percent of all home violence 30 percent of all suicides 60 percent of all child abuse 65 percent of all drownings It is estimated that when a woman contracts the disease her husband leaves her in nine out often cases when a man contracts it his wife leaves in one out of ten cases.
explicacao: Citação de Kathleen Whalen Fitzgerald sobre temas ligados a familia. “Jellinek's disease (alcoholism) is responsible for: 50 percent of all auto fatalities 80 percent …” articula familia, drink, drinking em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como drinking e drinkers.
